symptom_vector: network packet corruption causing extreme latency spikes and connection timeouts between services

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: recommendationservice 与 productcatalogservice 之间的网络通信因数据包损坏导致 rrt_max 指标异常飙升，引发连接超时
reasoning_chain: Step 1: 观察到 recommendationservice 的 rrt_max 指标从正常 3852.31μs 飙升至 499103975.85μs，增长约129,000倍
Step 2: 分析 recommendationservice-2 日志中出现 'Connection timed out' 错误，grpc_status=14，表明网络连接问题
Step 3: 确认 trace 数据中 recommendationservice->productcatalogservice 调用链出现极端延迟，且网络传输指标 pod_network_receive_bytes 和 pod_network_transmit_bytes 存在异常模式

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Extreme latency increase in service-to-service calls
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 recommendationservice 与 productcatalogservice 之间的调用链是否存在异常延迟，特别是 rrt_max 指标的极端飙升

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Abnormal proportion of failed requests in call chains
critical_checks.instruction: 分析 frontend->recommendationservice 和 recommendationservice->productcatalogservice 调用链中失败请求的比例异常

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Context canceled errors due to timeout propagation
critical_checks.instruction: 在 frontend 和 recommendationservice 日志中搜索 'context canceled' 关键词，确认超时传播

critical_checks.expected_pattern: HTTP 302 status codes indicating redirection issues
critical_checks.instruction: 检查日志中是否存在 HTTP 302 状态码，可能指示网络重定向问题

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Request error messages with RPC failures
critical_checks.instruction: 搜索包含 'request error' 的日志条目，特别是与 RPC 调用失败相关的错误

critical_checks.expected_pattern: RPC error messages with specific error codes
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 recommendationservice 日志中的 RPC 错误，特别是 grpc_status=14 的连接超时错误
在 recommendationservice 日志中搜索 'timeout' 关键词，确认连接超时问题
检查 trace 状态码中是否出现 UNAVAILABLE (状态码14) 错误

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Extreme spike in response time metrics
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 recommendationservice 的 rrt 和 rrt_max 指标是否出现极端飙升，特别是从微秒级到秒级的变化
分析服务间的请求和响应指标是否存在异常模式

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Increased error rates across multiple services
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 frontend、recommendationservice 和 productcatalogservice 的错误率指标是否同时上升
检查 recommendationservice 和 productcatalogservice 的内存使用指标是否存在异常

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Network traffic pattern anomalies indicating packet corruption
critical_checks.instruction: 分析 recommendationservice 和 productcatalogservice 的网络传输指标，检查是否存在数据包损坏的迹象
